'''gowadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utility|utility]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utility|utility]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gowadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || gowadhithi || gowadhiji || gowadhishi || gowadhiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || gowadhuthu || gowadhuju || gowadhushu || gowadhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || gowadhuthu || gowadhuju || gowadhushu || gowadhuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || gowadhufthuf || gowadhufjuf || gowadhufshuf || gowadhufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || gowadhethe || gowadheje || gowadheshe || gowadheke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || gowadhotho || gowadhojo || gowadhosho || gowadhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || gowadhotho || gowadhojo || gowadhosho || gowadhoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || gowadhofthof || gowadhofjof || gowadhofshof || gowadhofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || gowadhïfthïf || gowadhïfjïf || gowadhïfshïf || gowadhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || gowadhïfthïf || gowadhïfjïf || gowadhïfshïf || gowadhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || gowadhïfthïf || gowadhïfjïf || gowadhïfshïf || gowadhïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || gowadhïfthïf || gowadhïfjïf || gowadhïfshïf || gowadhïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || gowadhæthæ || gowadhæjæ || gowadhæshæ || gowadhækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || gowadhatha || gowadhaja || gowadhasha || gowadhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || gowadhatha || gowadhaja || gowadhasha || gowadhaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || gowadhafthaf || gowadhafjaf || gowadhafshaf || gowadhafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || gowadhasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || gowadhshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || gowadhroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || gowadhmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || gowadhyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogowadhnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogowadhnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogowadhnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogowadhnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || gowawadhasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || gowawadhshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || gowawadhroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || gowawadhmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || gowawadhyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogowawadhnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogowawadhnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogowawadhnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogowawadhnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || gewædhasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || gewædhshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || gewædhroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || gewædhmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || gewædhyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogewædhnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogewædhnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogewædhnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogewædhnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || gowfadhasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || gowfadhshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || gowfadhroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || gowfadhmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || gowfadhyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gogowfadhnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gogowfadhnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gogowfadhnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gogowfadhnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
